Package org.bukkit.inventory.view

@Experimental package org.bukkit.inventory.view
Package for InventoryView child interfaces that house further usability for InventoryView.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.bukkit.inventory
    Classes involved in manipulating player inventories and item interactions.
    org.bukkit.inventory.view.builder
    A Package that contains builders for building InventoryViews.
    org.bukkit.inventory.meta
    The interfaces used when manipulating extra data can can be stored inside item stacks.
    org.bukkit.inventory.recipe
    New location for recipe-related classes.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    AnvilView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to anvil view data.
    BeaconView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to beacon view data.
    BrewingStandView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to brewing stand view data.
    CrafterView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to crafter view data.
    EnchantmentView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to enchantment table view data.
    FurnaceView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to furnace view data.
    LecternView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to lectern view data.
    LoomView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to loom view data.
    MerchantView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to merchant view data.
    StonecutterView
    An instance of InventoryView which provides extra methods related to stonecutter view data.
